title: Better Leather
description: A small mod that makes leather more convenient and usable.
body:
Welcome to Better Leather!


Currently, this mod adds three new methods of acquiring leather, and one new way to use it.


Acquisition methods:

1. Combine four rotten flesh into the new "patchwork flesh" item, then smelt it into leather.

2. Combine 6 of any combination of mushrooms- overworld or nether- into patchwork flesh, then smelt it into leather.

3. Pigs now have a chance to drop leather when killed.

 
Uses:

1. Saddles can now be crafted with a lead in the upper left, three leather in the middle row, and one iron ingot in the bottom center.

 
Future Updates Planned:

- Improvements to leather armor (possibly exclusive enchantments)

- Steel-toed boots, with the strength of iron but the ability to walk on powdered snow

- Support for more Minecraft versions.

- Even more? Who knows!


Thanks for checking out Better Leather! Feel free to leave feedback and suggestions :]

-Pythia
